user_request: Emergency rite: drop pod descent prep requires drop pod descent prep
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: drop pod descent prep requires drop pod descent prep

### TOPIC
drop pod descent prep

### COMPONENT
drop pod descent prep

### OPERATION
drop pod descent prep

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- drop pod descent prep
- drop pod descent prep

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed descent upon the drop pod descent prep, vessel of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Sanctify the drop pod descent prep with holy oils and binary litanies.
Second: Verify all restraint mechanisms and gravitational compensators through rigorous drop pod descent prep protocols.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the drop pod descent prep, commanding smooth atmospheric ingress and blessed impact upon the Emperor's foes.
Fourth: Chant the Litany of Descent thrice whilst the drop pod descent prep achieves terminal velocity.

user_request: Emergency rite: lascannon requires capacitor charge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: lascannon requires capacitor charge

### TOPIC
lascannon capacitor charge

### COMPONENT
lascannon

### OPERATION
capacitor charge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lascannon
- capacitor charge

### PRAYER
prayer:
Oh blessed lascannon, instrument of the Omnissiah's righteous fury, receive now our capacitor charge.
First: Genuflect before the lascannon and anoint its focusing crystal with sacred promethium.
Second: Initiate capacitor charge through the blessed distribution conduits, channeling the Emperor's wrath into the lascannon's crystalline matrix.
Third: Recite the Hymn of Charged Vengeance whilst the lascannon's weapon spirit awakens to lethal potency.
Fourth: Verify full capacitor charge saturation, that the lascannon may deliver annihilation unto the enemies of Mankind.

Second: Perform calibration upon the pressure gauge with methodical precision, adjusting each gauge marker to divine harmonics.

Fourth: Seal the calibration with the Mark of the Omnissiah upon the pressure gauge's housing.
